source: Things to do in Raleigh this Weekend! — Thingstodo919

events.name: The Soccer Tournament
events.tagline: A high-stakes 7v7 soccer festival with top players, clubs, and plenty of fan energy.
events.description: The Soccer Tournament (TST) is a six-day 7v7 soccer festival held at WakeMed Soccer Park in Cary, featuring high-stakes matches, music, food, and fan activations. The 2026 event runs May 27–June 1.

events.name: UNC Health Championship presented by Stitch
events.tagline: Korn Ferry Tour golf returns to Raleigh Country Club for a four-day pro tournament.
events.scheduleNote: Fri tee times start 6:45 AM; gates open 6:30 AM
events.description: The UNC Health Championship presented by Stitch is a Korn Ferry Tour golf tournament held at Raleigh Country Club. The 2026 event runs May 28–31, with Friday rounds and spectator access available by ticket.

events.name: HAMILTON
events.tagline: The Broadway hit returns to Durham for a limited run at DPAC.
events.description: Hamilton is scheduled at DPAC in Durham on Friday, May 29, 2026 at 7:30 PM. DPAC lists additional performances on May 30 and May 31 as part of the show’s Durham run.

events.name: NC High School Athletic Association Girls Soccer State Championships
events.tagline: State title matches bring North Carolina’s top girls soccer teams to Durham County Memorial Stadium.
events.description: The North Carolina High School Athletic Association Girls Soccer State Championships are scheduled for May 28-30, 2026 at Durham County Memorial Stadium in Durham. Championship games on the weekend of May 29-30 include three Friday matches and three Saturday matches.

events.name: Discover Dance: Bharatanatyam Session
events.tagline: An outdoor evening of movement, rhythm, and storytelling inspired by Bharatanatyam.
events.description: Ramya S. Kapadia and her ensemble will guide participants through movement, rhythm, and storytelling inspired by Bharatanatyam. The event takes place at Downtown Cary Park’s Great Lawn Pavilion.

events.name: Guy Torry
events.tagline: Guy Torry brings a multi-show weekend of stand-up to Raleigh Improv.
events.description: Guy Torry is scheduled to perform stand-up at Raleigh Improv in Cary on Friday, May 29, 2026, with shows at 7:00 PM and 9:15 PM. The venue listing also shows additional performances across the same weekend.

events.name: JC Currais
events.tagline: A weekend of sharp stand-up at Goodnights' Room 861.
events.scheduleNote: Fri 9:30 PM · Sat 7:30 PM & 10:00 PM · Sun not listed
events.description: JC Currais is scheduled at Goodnights Comedy Club in Raleigh as part of the Room 861 series. Listings show performances across the May 29-31 weekend, with tickets available through the venue and ticketing partners.

events.name: Lavell Crawford
events.tagline: Lavell Crawford brings a weekend run of stand-up to Goodnights Comedy Club.
events.scheduleNote: Fri 7:00 PM · Sat 7:00 PM · Sun 6:00 PM
events.description: Stand-up comic Lavell Crawford is scheduled for a recurring engagement at Goodnights Comedy Club in Raleigh from May 29–31, 2026. The venue listing shows multiple showtimes over the weekend, including Friday at 7:00 PM.

events.name: Burning Coal Theatre presents KidsWrite! Festival 2026
events.tagline: A showcase of new one-act plays written by young North Carolina playwrights.
events.description: Burning Coal Theatre’s annual KidsWrite! Festival presents professional productions of one-act plays written by local 6th-12th grade students. The 2026 festival is scheduled for May 29-30 at 7 PM at Murphey School Auditorium in Raleigh.

events.name: Big Screen Bash
events.tagline: A family-friendly evening of games, community fun, and an outdoor movie screening.
events.description: Big Screen Bash is a family-friendly summer event at Lions Park and Community Center featuring outdoor games, carnival-style activities, bingo, and a group screening of Zootopia 2 indoors at sunset. Guests are encouraged to bring lawn chairs, blankets, and their own food and drinks.

events.name: Adam Knight’s Buried Alive – A tribute to Phish
events.tagline: A high-energy Phish tribute lands at Lincoln Theatre for one night only.
events.scheduleNote: Fri 8:30 PM · doors one hour prior
events.description: Adam Knight’s Buried Alive is a Southeast-based tribute band dedicated to performing the music of Phish. The show is scheduled for Friday, May 29, 2026 at Lincoln Theatre in downtown Raleigh.

events.name: An Evening with Seth Walker
events.tagline: An intimate live performance by acclaimed singer-songwriter Seth Walker.
events.description: Seth Walker is scheduled to perform at The Wake Forest Listening Room in Wake Forest on Friday, May 29, 2026. The event is listed as all ages, with doors at 6:45 PM and showtime at 7:30 PM.

events.name: Artist Notes featuring River Shook
events.tagline: An intimate live music and artist-conversation night at Centennial Campus.
events.description: Artist Notes featuring River Shook is scheduled for Friday, May 29, 2026 at The Corner at Centennial Campus in Raleigh. The event pairs live performances with artist conversation, with doors opening at 6:30 p.m. and the concert running from 7:00 to 9:30 p.m.

events.name: Canes Easter Conference Finals Watch Party
events.tagline: Watch the Canes’ Eastern Conference Finals action with fellow fans at Tap Yard House.
events.description: A Carolina Hurricanes playoff watch party hosted at Tap Yard House in Raleigh. Visit Raleigh lists the event on Friday, May 29, 2026, at 8 PM with free admission.

events.name: Carolina Hurricanes Playoff Watch Party
events.tagline: Watch the Canes playoff game with fans at Tin Roof Raleigh.
events.description: Official Carolina Hurricanes playoff watch party at Tin Roof Raleigh on Friday, May 29, 2026. The event is listed for 8 PM and admission is free.

events.name: Community Engagement Attending Senior Prom
events.tagline: A senior prom celebration at Roberts Park in Raleigh.
events.description: Community Engagement Attending Senior Prom is scheduled for Friday, May 29, 2026 at Roberts Park in Raleigh. The RaleighNC.gov listing gives the event time as 4 p.m. to 6:30 p.m.

events.name: Dapper Conspiracy
events.tagline: Folk swamp rock live at Slim's Dive Bar.
events.description: Dapper Conspiracy is scheduled to perform at Slim's Dive Bar in downtown Raleigh on Friday, May 29, 2026, from 8 to 11 p.m. Visit Raleigh lists the venue address as 227 S. Wilmington St., Raleigh, NC 27601.

events.name: Flat Baroque Burlesque and Variety Show
events.tagline: An art-centric burlesque and variety show with painting, figure drawing, and community flair.
events.description: Flat Baroque is an art-centric burlesque and variety show at Cannonball Music Hall in Raleigh. The event includes burlesque, performance art, immersive painting, figure drawing, and a live auction, with proceeds benefiting Raleigh nonprofit CoLab.

events.name: Hot N' Heavy: All Metal Covers Burlesque Show
events.tagline: Heavy metal riffs meet burlesque in a high-energy late-night show.
events.description: Groovy Tomb and Tool Chest Productions presents a heavy metal burlesque show with cover-style metal music and performance art. The event is scheduled for May 29, 2026 at Chapel of Bones in Raleigh.

events.name: Ladies Night
events.tagline: A Friday-night gathering at The Portal HQ in Raleigh.
events.description: Ladies Night takes place on Friday, May 29, 2026 at The Portal HQ in Raleigh. The event is listed with a start time of 8 PM and is presented by In Tha Fest.

events.name: Michael Jackson Theme Night
events.tagline: A Friday night tribute celebrating the music and legacy of Michael Jackson.
events.description: Michael Jackson Theme Night is a tribute event hosted at Smash in downtown Raleigh. The event is scheduled for Friday, May 29, 2026 from 7–11 PM.

events.name: Paprika // M.Roomie // The Midnight Still
events.tagline: A Friday night lineup of indie acts at Neptune’s Parlour.
events.description: Live music event featuring Paprika, M.Roomie, and The Midnight Still at Neptune's Parlour in downtown Raleigh. Listings show doors at 7 PM, show at 8 PM, with $12 admission.

events.name: Solya with Tele Novella
events.tagline: An all-ages indie double bill lands at KINGS for a Friday night set.
events.description: Solya and Tele Novella perform at KINGS in downtown Raleigh on Friday, May 29, 2026. The event is listed as all ages, with doors at 7 PM and showtime at 8 PM.

events.name: The Art of Research: A Curator’s Celebration
events.tagline: Celebrate the research behind a new NCMA catalogue with a curator-led talk.
events.venue: North Carolina Museum of Art, East Building, SECU Auditorium
events.description: Caroline Rocheleau, NCMA director of research and curator of ancient collections, discusses the ten years of scholarly and scientific research behind Ancient Greek, Italian, and Roman Art. The event celebrates the publication of the museum’s first catalogue dedicated to the collection.

events.name: The Hourglass Kids w/ Domocile, Grocery Boy Jr.
events.tagline: A high-energy local bill at The Pour House.
events.venue: The Pour House Music Hall & Record Shop
events.description: The Hourglass Kids play The Pour House Music Hall & Record Shop in downtown Raleigh with Domocile and Grocery Boy Jr. The listing shows doors at 8:00 PM and a 9:00 PM show on Friday, May 29, 2026.

events.name: Laughs in Spanish
events.tagline: A fast-paced, code-switching comedy about art, ambition, and mothers and daughters.
events.description: Bulldog Ensemble Theater presents 'Laughs in Spanish' by Alexis Scheer, directed by Jo Palazuelos-Krukowski. It runs at Mettlesome in Durham from May 28-June 7, 2026, with the Friday performance on May 29 at 7:00 PM.

events.name: Feed the Need - Meals on Meals Durham Gala
events.tagline: An elegant Durham fundraiser with dinner, auctions, and live entertainment.
events.description: The 7th Annual Feed the Need Gala for Meals on Wheels Durham takes place at Washington Duke Inn & Golf Club in Durham on Friday, May 29, 2026. The event features a cocktail hour, dinner, auctions, and entertainment to support Meals on Wheels Durham.

events.name: Triangle Drag Show
events.tagline: Live drag, cocktails, and rooftop views at The Durham Hotel.
events.description: Triangle Drag Club hosts a live drag show on The Durham Hotel rooftop on Friday, May 29, from 6–9 PM. The event features 4–6 performers, a DJ, cocktails, and small plates, hosted by Izzy A Problem.

events.name: Live Music @ATC Tower: Jones Doom Jazz Band
events.tagline: Free live jazz beside Durham’s iconic water tower.
events.description: Jones Doom Jazz Band performs a free live concert at the Water Tower at American Tobacco Campus in Durham. The event is presented by Live at Bay 7 and runs from 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM.

events.name: The ER's
events.tagline: A Friday night jazz set at Sharp Nine Gallery in Durham.
events.description: The ER's performs at Sharp Nine Gallery in Durham on Friday, May 29 at 7:30 PM. Admission is listed at $15–$30, with tickets available through the Durham Jazz Workshop concert listing.

events.name: Broadway Rave at Stanczyks
events.tagline: A 21+ Broadway dance party packed with showtunes and musical-theatre energy.
events.description: Broadway Rave is a Broadway-themed dance party at Stanczyks in Durham. The event is scheduled for Friday, May 29, 2026, with doors at 8:30 PM and showtime at 9:00 PM; it is 21+.

events.name: SCIrens: Science-Themed Drag & Burlesque
events.tagline: A high-energy science-meets-sequins drag and burlesque night.
events.description: SCIrens: Science-Themed Drag & Burlesque is a 21+ show at The Pinhook in Durham featuring drag and burlesque performances with a science theme. The event is scheduled for Friday, May 29, with doors at 8:30 pm and showtime at 9 pm.

events.name: Square Dance with Live Band & Caller
events.tagline: Kick up your heels at a live square dance in Cedar Grove.
events.description: A square dance with a live band and caller at Botanist and Barrel in Cedar Grove on Friday, May 29, 2026. The event runs from 6:00 PM to 8:30 PM.

events.name: Last Fridays & The Art Walk
events.tagline: Hillsborough’s monthly downtown art crawl brings galleries, live performances, and a makers market to the courthouse lawn.
events.description: A free monthly event in downtown Hillsborough featuring the Art Walk, artist receptions at local venues, and live entertainment. The Old Orange County Courthouse lawn hosts makers market activities and performances as part of the evening programming.

events.name: Dix Park Inter-Tribal Pow Wow
events.tagline: A free celebration of Indigenous culture with dancing, drumming, vendors, and music.
events.description: Presented in partnership with Triangle Native American Society, this annual pow wow features competition dancing, drumming, music, and vendors at Harvey Hill in Dix Park. It is open to the public and free to attend.

events.name: Epic Film Scores
events.tagline: An outdoor symphonic night of iconic movie music under the stars.
events.description: UNC Health Summerfest with the North Carolina Symphony presents film music from works such as Chariots of Fire, The Lord of the Rings, and Titanic. The performance takes place at Koka Booth Amphitheatre in Cary on Saturday, May 30, 2026.

events.name: CaryLIVE
events.tagline: Free live music in Downtown Cary Park’s Great Lawn Pavilion.
events.description: CaryLIVE! is a free outdoor concert series in Downtown Cary Park. The series features live music at the Great Lawn Pavilion in Cary.

events.name: Young The Giant, Cold War Kids & Almost Monday
events.tagline: An outdoor summer rock show at Red Hat Amphitheater.
events.description: Young the Giant headlines the Victory Garden Tour with special guests Cold War Kids and almost monday at Red Hat Amphitheater. The Raleigh show is scheduled for Saturday, May 30, 2026, with doors at 5:30 PM and the performance starting at 6:30 PM.

events.name: Josh Gates Live! An Evening of Legends, Mysteries, and Tales of Adventure
events.tagline: Josh Gates brings stories of exploration, mystery, and adventure to Durham.
events.description: Josh Gates, known for Discovery Channel’s Expedition Unknown and Josh Gates Tonight, appears for an evening of adventure featuring stories from his expeditions. The Durham performance is scheduled for Saturday, May 30, 2026 at 8:00 PM at Carolina Theatre - Fletcher Hall.

events.name: Ben Folds & A Piano Tour
events.tagline: Ben Folds brings his solo piano tour to downtown Raleigh for one night only.
events.venue: Meymandi Concert Hall at Martin Marietta Center for the Performing Arts
events.description: Ben Folds & A Piano Tour with special guest Lindsey Kraft is scheduled for May 30, 2026 at Meymandi Concert Hall in downtown Raleigh. The performance is listed to begin at 8:00 PM, with doors opening at 7:00 PM.

events.name: BHS 100 Celebration Kickoff
events.tagline: A centennial kickoff for Broughton High School featuring two local bands.
events.description: This all-ages event celebrates the kickoff of the centennial anniversary of Raleigh’s Needham B. Broughton High School. It features performances by The Circus and Steam Room Etiquette, with proceeds supporting BHS 100 centennial events and scholarships.

events.name: Around the World, Raleigh
events.tagline: A free downtown festival celebrating global food, culture, and performances.
events.description: Around the World, Raleigh is a festival presented by The MAKRS Society that features food and cultures from around the world through regional 'neighborhoods,' vendors, performances, and activities. It takes place at Moore Square in downtown Raleigh on Saturday, May 30, 2026, from 11 AM to 7 PM.

events.name: Caffeine & Machines Monthly Car Show Series
events.tagline: A free, family-friendly monthly car show with 200+ cars of all styles and builds.
events.description: Caffeine & Machines is a recurring monthly car show held on the last Saturday at Triangle Town Center in North Raleigh. The event features a large outdoor display of cars and is free to attend.

events.name: Still. Moving: Zonal Harmonic 170,000 and Zonal Harmonic 220,000 as interpreted by Rainbow Dance Co./Arts Together
events.tagline: A contemporary dance performance inspired by Tomás Saraceno’s artworks at NCMA.
events.venue: North Carolina Museum of Art, West Building
events.description: Created in dialogue with Zonal Harmonic 170,000 and Zonal Harmonic 220,000, this original work by Rainbow Dance Co./Arts Together explores unseen architectures of movement, gathering, and belonging. It is part of NCMA’s performance series interpreting works from the People’s Collection.

events.name: A New Nash Bash
events.tagline: A free family-friendly block party to help shape the future of Nash Square.
events.description: A New Nash Bash is a family-friendly public block party at Nash Square with activities focused on the Nash Square Public Realm planning project. The event runs Saturday, May 30, from 2 to 6 p.m. and is open to all ages.

events.name: Party for the Planet
events.tagline: Celebrate conservation with hands-on activities and community partners at the Museum of Life and Science.
events.description: An environmental education event featuring local environmental organizations, hands-on ecology activities, animal encounters, and conservation-themed programming across the Museum campus. The museum lists the event on Saturday, May 30, 2026, from 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM.

events.name: ADF Presents: Wally Cardona & Molly Lieber
events.tagline: An intimate American Dance Festival performance in ADF’s Scripps Dance Studios.
events.description: American Dance Festival presents Wally Cardona & Molly Lieber at ADF’s Scripps Dance Studios in Durham. The event is listed for Saturday, May 30, 2026 at 7:00 PM.

events.name: flART Market
events.tagline: Durham’s flea-and-art market with local makers, live music, and food trucks.
events.description: flART Market is a flea and art market at Artpost featuring 60+ local vendors, live music and performances, and local food trucks. It is held at ArtPost Supplies & Studios in Durham and is free to attend.

events.name: 4th Annual International Children’s Day Festival & Luisito’s Bilingual Book Fair | Feria Bilingüe del Libro de Luisito
events.tagline: A free bilingual family festival with books, crafts, and performances.
events.description: The 4th Annual International Children’s Day Festival & Luisito’s Bilingual Book Fair is a free bilingual event at the City of Raleigh Museum with books, crafts, storytelling, and performances. It is scheduled for Saturday, May 30, 2026, from 10:00 AM to 3:30 PM.

events.name: Bach to Rock DJ Showcase
events.tagline: Bach to Rock students spin live sets in a local venue showcase.
events.description: A Bach to Rock student DJ showcase featuring live performances by Beat Refinery students in a local venue setting. Bach to Rock describes these showcases as live events where students present their DJ skills for an audience.

events.name: Kendra Gives Back Re-Grand Opening Event
events.tagline: Celebrate the relaunch of Kendra Scott at The Streets at Southpoint with a community giveback event.
events.venue: Kendra Scott at The Streets at Southpoint
events.description: Discover Durham lists the Kendra Gives Back Re-Grand Opening Event on Saturday, May 30, 2026 at Kendra Scott in Durham. The listing provides the venue address at 8030 Renaissance Pkwy, Ste 925, and indicates a giveback-style reopening event.

events.name: Paul McCartney Listening Party
events.tagline: Free all-ages listening party celebrating Paul McCartney’s new release.
events.description: A free, all-ages listening party at The Pour House Music Hall & Record Shop’s Record Shop in downtown Raleigh. The event celebrates the release of Paul McCartney’s new album, with music played in-store and giveaways while supplies last.

events.name: PONDER Program: Park it at the Market
events.tagline: A market-style community event at Downtown Cary Park.
events.description: PONDER Program: Park it at the Market is listed for Downtown Cary Park in Cary. The provided listing suggests a market-oriented community event, but no detailed schedule was available from the source.

events.name: Mental Wellness Skate Block Party 2026
events.tagline: A free skatepark block party mixing wellness resources, community fun, and music.
events.description: Mental Wellness Skate Block Party 2026 is scheduled for Saturday, May 30, 2026 at Conlon Family Skatepark in Raleigh. The event is a free community block party centered on mental wellness and skate culture.

events.name: Los Novios de Martita Tributo A Los Fabuloso Cadillacs & Los Autenticos Decandentes
events.tagline: A high-energy tribute night celebrating two iconic Latin rock bands.
events.description: Live musical tribute to Los Fabulosos Cadillacs and Los Auténticos Decadentes at Chapel of Bones in Raleigh. The event is scheduled for Saturday, May 30, 2026 at 8:00 PM with tickets priced at $25.

events.name: In the End - Linkin Park Experience
events.tagline: A high-energy Linkin Park tribute night at The Ritz.
events.description: In The End is a Los Angeles-based Linkin Park tribute band performing at The Ritz in Raleigh on Saturday, May 30, 2026. The show is listed for 7 PM with admission starting at $21.

events.name: Raleigh Book Fair
events.tagline: A free, book-loving market with indie authors, local makers, and literary finds.
events.description: The Raleigh Book Fair is a free community event at Raleigh Iron Works featuring 70+ bookish vendors, indie bookstores, authors, curated gifts, and other literary-themed goods. It is presented by Front Paige Media and is scheduled for Saturday, May 30, 2026, from 12 to 5 p.m.

events.name: Running of the Bulls 8K
events.tagline: Durham’s premier community road race finishes on the warning track at Historic Durham Athletic Park.
events.description: This 8K road race runs through downtown Durham, American Tobacco Campus, Trinity Park, and Old North Durham before finishing with a lap on the warning track inside Historic Durham Athletic Park. The race is the 18th running of Durham’s community road race and is stroller-friendly, but dogs and headphones are not permitted.

events.name: Cirque du Sol-Rave
events.tagline: A circus-themed rave with fire, aerial, drag, and all-night performances.
events.freeNote: $15 early bird; $20–25 presale; $35 GA; $35 at door
events.description: Cirque du Sol-Rave is a 21+ circus-themed micro-fest and rave presented by Geodesic Productions at The Fruit in Durham. The event features multiple stages, fire and circus performers, art exhibits, and late-night entertainment.

events.name: Reggae & Rum Festival
events.tagline: Caribbean flavors, rum cocktails, and reggae music at Mystic Farm & Distillery.
events.description: A reggae and rum-themed festival at Mystic Farm & Distillery featuring reggae bands, Caribbean-inspired food trucks, rum cocktails, craft vendors, and a free bourbon tasting. The event is listed as all-ages, with ages 18+ requiring a ticket.

events.name: Field Day
events.tagline: A Saturday morning field event at Piney Wood Park in Durham.
events.description: Field Day is scheduled for Saturday, May 29, 2026 at Piney Wood Park's baseball field in Durham. Discover Durham lists the event from 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM with $12 admission.

events.name: UCAN Cooking Class! A Comfort Food Experience
events.tagline: A hands-on comfort food cooking class at SEEDS Durham.
events.description: A UCAN cooking class focused on comfort food, held at SEEDS Durham in Durham. The event is scheduled for Saturday from 11:00 AM to 2:00 PM.

events.name: Illuminate Spring Concert by Common Woman Chorus
events.tagline: A spring concert celebrating light, community, and queer joy.
events.description: Common Woman Chorus presents its spring concert, Illuminate, at Eno River Unitarian Universalist Fellowship in Durham. The event features a general-admission performance with tickets priced on a sliding scale from $10 to $50.

events.name: Live @ ATC: Screamin’ Bridge
events.tagline: Free live music at ATC Tower in downtown Durham.
events.description: Live Music @ATC Tower: Screamin’ Bridge is a free live music event at ATC Tower in Durham. Discover Durham lists the performance at 3:00 PM with admission marked free.

events.name: Eric Williams Quintet
events.tagline: A Saturday night jazz set celebrating Miles Davis and John Coltrane at Sharp 9 Gallery.
events.description: Eric Williams Quintet presents "Miles & Coltrane @ 100" at Sharp Nine Gallery in Durham. The show begins at 7:30 PM, with tickets priced from $15 to $30.

events.name: Durham Comedy Friends | Weldon Mills Distillery
events.tagline: A stacked Saturday night of stand-up comedy at Weldon Mills Distillery.
events.description: Stand-up comedy event at Weldon Mills Distillery in Durham, featuring a comedy lineup on Saturday night. The event is listed for May 30, 2026, with craft cocktails and premium spirits available at the venue.

events.name: Barn Dance with LA Fernandez & Shady Neighbor
events.tagline: A lively barn dance night of blues, Americana, and rock in Chapel Hill.
events.description: Barn Dance with L.A. Fernandez & Shady Neighbor is scheduled for Saturday, May 30, 2026 from 6:30 PM to 9:00 PM at Sunrise Community Farm Center in Chapel Hill. Listings describe it as a live music event featuring blues, Americana, and rock.

events.name: Chelsea Classics Kick Off!
events.tagline: A free kickoff celebration for Chelsea Theater’s summer classic film series.
events.description: An open, free community event celebrating the start of Chelsea Theater’s summer programming of classic repertory films. The event includes live screenprinting, free posters, and local vendors.

events.name: Crawfish Boil In Support of WHUP 104.7 FM
events.tagline: A community crawfish boil at Sonark Farms benefiting Hillsborough’s WHUP 104.7 FM.
events.description: A Sonark Farms community crawfish boil held in support of WHUP 104.7 FM. The event takes place at The Bar(n) at Sonark Farms in Hillsborough.

events.name: Library Comic Fest
events.tagline: A free comics and fandom celebration at the Chapel Hill Public Library.
events.description: Library Comic Fest is a comics-themed community event at the Chapel Hill Public Library. The listing indicates a Saturday event in Chapel Hill and suggests a family-friendly celebration of comics and fandom.

events.name: Street Fighter 6 Tournament
events.tagline: A weekend SF6 bracket at EgoChall Esports in Chapel Hill.
events.description: EgoChall’s Street Fighter 6 tournament is scheduled for Saturday and Sunday, May 30–31, 2026, in Chapel Hill. Registration is listed on start.gg, and the event is also promoted by Visit Chapel Hill.

events.name: UpClose Chamber Music | The Durham Fellows & Jordan Bak, viola
events.tagline: The Durham Fellows and violist Jordan Bak close out the season with an intimate chamber program.
events.description: The Chamber Orchestra of the Triangle presents UpClose Chamber Music featuring The Durham Fellows and guest violist Jordan Bak. The program is scheduled for Saturday, May 30, 2026, at CURRENT Studio in Chapel Hill.

events.name: Zebulon Devil Dogz vs. Tri-City Chili Peppers
events.tagline: Coastal Plain League baseball returns to Five County Stadium for a Zebulon home game.
events.description: A Coastal Plain League baseball matchup featuring the Zebulon Devil Dogz hosting the Tri-City Chili Peppers at Five County Stadium in Zebulon. Ticket listings show the game scheduled for Saturday, May 30, 2026 at 6:30 PM.

events.name: The Great Cary Garden Tour 2026
events.tagline: Explore 13 private gardens across Cary on a self-guided weekend tour.
events.address: Various Gardens Around Cary, Cary, NC
events.scheduleNote: Sat 10 AM–5 PM · Sun 1 PM–5 PM
events.description: A self-guided Cary-wide garden tour presented by the Cary Woman's Club and Mom's Valentine for You. The event features 13 gardens and is a fundraiser for local nonprofit groups.

events.name: The Band Solstice w/ The John Wood Band
events.tagline: An indie rock double bill at The Pour House.
events.venue: The Pour House Music Hall & Record Shop
events.description: The Band Solstice and The John Wood Band are scheduled for a Saturday night show at The Pour House Music Hall & Record Shop in Raleigh. Listing sources describe it as an 18+ event with doors/show timing that aligns with a late-night concert.

events.name: Shakespeare in the Parks: As You Like It
events.tagline: Free outdoor Shakespeare under the stars in Knightdale.
events.freeNote: General admission is free; VIP seating available
events.description: Switch Theatre Company presents an abridged production of As You Like It at Knightdale Station Park Amphitheater. The event is part of the Shakespeare in the Parks series and is offered free to the public, with reserved VIP seating available.

events.name: Pop That Party, An All Pink Pre-Pride Month Party
events.tagline: A pink-themed pre-Pride celebration in Raleigh.
events.description: Pop That Party is an all-pink, pre-Pride month party listed for Bitter Social in Raleigh. The newsletter listing identifies it as a Saturday event, but no additional schedule, price, or venue address details were provided in the available source.

events.name: Dakota Proctor & Goddamn Wolves
events.tagline: A night of local rock at Slim's Dive Bar.
events.description: Dakota Proctor & Goddamn Wolves is scheduled for Saturday, May 30, 2026 at Slim's Dive Bar in downtown Raleigh. Visit Raleigh lists the show time as Saturday at 8 PM.

events.name: Bearly Dead – Grateful Dead Tribute
events.tagline: A danceable Grateful Dead tribute night at Lincoln Theatre.
events.description: Bearly Dead is a Boston-based Grateful Dead tribute band known for extended, improvised, danceable concerts. The Raleigh show is scheduled for Saturday, May 30, 2026 at Lincoln Theatre.

events.name: Aching Back Sunday
events.tagline: Pop-punk nostalgia with classic hits and a party atmosphere.
events.description: Aching Back Sunday is a live music event at Kings in downtown Raleigh, featuring classic pop-punk and emo hits. The show is scheduled for Saturday, May 30, 2026, with doors at 7:00 PM and music at 8:00 PM.

events.name: Jody Servon Seminar at NCMA
events.tagline: An afternoon seminar at NCMA featuring Jody Servon.
events.description: A seminar at the North Carolina Museum of Art in Raleigh featuring Jody Servon. The event is listed for Sunday, May 31, 2026 at 1:30 PM.

events.name: Insane Clown Posse
events.tagline: The Detroit duo brings its high-energy horrorcore show to The Ritz.
events.description: Insane Clown Posse is scheduled to perform at The Ritz in Raleigh on Sunday, May 31, 2026, at 6:00 PM. The event is listed with admission starting at $87+.

events.name: DOJO Day: Food, Anime, and Sumo Culture
events.tagline: A free Japanese-culture celebration with sumo, origami, and performances.
events.description: Dojo Day at Waverly Place features Japanese food, anime-inspired culture, live performances, a Raijin sumo demo, and origami activities. The event also includes vendors and a raffle.

events.name: 2026 Summer Concert Series
events.tagline: Free Sunday evening concerts at Fred Fletcher Park.
events.description: A free summer concert series hosted by Raleigh Parks on select Sunday evenings at Fred Fletcher Park. Concerts feature local acts, are open to all ages, and encourage guests to bring a blanket or chair.

events.name: Summer Food Truck Rodeo
events.tagline: A free Sunday afternoon of food trucks, drinks, and family fun at Durham Central Park.
events.description: Durham Central Park’s Summer Food Truck Rodeo brings together dozens of local food trucks, craft beverages, and family activities. The May 31, 2026 event also includes a Club Fair and other community activities.

events.name: Six Sundays in Spring 2026 (Last Event)
events.tagline: Wake Forest’s free Sunday concert series wraps up with live music at Joyner Park.
events.description: The 2026 Six Sundays in Spring concert series is scheduled for six consecutive Sundays from April 26 through May 31 at E. Carroll Joyner Park Amphitheater in Wake Forest. The final event on May 31 runs from 5:30 to 7:30 p.m. and is presented by ARTS Wake Forest.

events.name: Rooftop Yoga
events.tagline: Sunrise rooftop yoga with downtown Raleigh views.
events.description: Oak City Yoga hosts a rooftop yoga session at The Willard Rooftop Lounge in downtown Raleigh. The event page describes it as a class on the rooftop terrace with registration required and a mimosa included.

events.name: The Sunday Chill with Carter: Carter Minor & Lindsay Rosebrock
events.tagline: A relaxed Sunday set of jazz and blues at The Blue Note Grill.
events.description: A Sunday afternoon performance at The Blue Note Grill featuring Carter Minor and Lindsay Rosebrock. Discover Durham lists the event for Sunday, May 31, 2026 at 709 Washington St in Durham.

events.name: Sunday DRIFT Rooftop DJ Series at The Velvet Hippo!
events.tagline: Sunday rooftop DJ sets with skyline views, spritz specials, and no cover.
events.description: A recurring Sunday afternoon rooftop DJ series at The Velvet Hippo in downtown Durham. The event runs from 4:00 to 7:00 PM, is free to attend, and is 21+.

events.name: Sunday Set with DJ Jarvis
events.tagline: A Sunday rooftop DJ session at The Durham with music, oysters, and spritzes.
events.freeNote: No cover; food and drinks available for purchase
events.description: Select Sundays March through October, The Durham Hotel hosts Sunday Set on the Roof with DJ Jarvis. The event features DJ sets along with $2 oysters and a $10 build-your-own spritz bar.

events.name: Annie Dukes // Reveri3 // Sonic Blooms
events.tagline: A late-night Sunday concert at Neptunes Parlour.
events.description: Live music event featuring Annie Dukes, Reveri3, and Sonic Blooms at Neptunes Parlour in downtown Raleigh. The listing shows doors at 7 PM, show at 7:30 PM, with a $10 admission.

events.name: Basic Printer x Valentine Wolfe
events.tagline: An immersive double bill blending pulse and atmosphere.
events.description: Basic Printer and Valentine Wolfe are scheduled for a live double bill at Cannonball Music Hall in Raleigh on Sunday, May 31, 2026. The show is listed for 7:30 PM to 11:00 PM EDT.

events.name: Bike Month 2026 Afterparty
events.tagline: Celebrate Bike Month with rides, prizes, and a raffle at Le Dive.
events.description: A Bike Month Raleigh afterparty at Le Dive in downtown Raleigh featuring passport prize pickup and a grand-prize raffle. The event runs Sunday, May 31, 2026 from 5–8 PM.

events.name: Found Footage, Ajena, & Marigold
events.tagline: A punk night at Slim's Dive Bar.
events.description: Found Footage, Ajena, & Marigold is a live music event at Slim's Dive Bar in downtown Raleigh on Sunday, May 31, 2026. Listings describe it as a punk night from 8 to 10 PM.

events.name: Holly Springs Salamanders vs. Wilmington Sharks
events.tagline: Baseball at North Main Athletic Complex as the Salamanders host the Sharks.
events.description: Holly Springs Salamanders baseball game against the Wilmington Sharks at North Main Athletic Complex in Holly Springs. The matchup is part of the Salamanders' 2026 home schedule.

events.name: Java Jog
events.tagline: A casual community run starting and ending at The Bike Library.
events.description: Java Jog is a casual run that starts and ends at The Bike Library storefront in Raleigh. The event appears to be a community group run rather than a ticketed race.

events.name: John Hollier & the Rêverie
events.tagline: A Sunday night stop on John Hollier’s tour at The Pour House.
events.venue: The Pour House Music Hall & Record Shop
events.description: John Hollier & the Rêverie is scheduled to perform at The Pour House Music Hall & Record Shop in Raleigh on Sunday, May 31, 2026, at 8:00 PM. The event is listed as a concert stop on the artist’s tour and tickets are available.

events.name: Lisa Lewis Was A Good Egg memorial
events.tagline: A night of memories and music celebrating Lisa Lewis.
events.description: A memorial event at Lincoln Theatre in Raleigh featuring performances by The Cartridge Family, Hank Sinatra, and Richard Bacchus and the Luckiest Girls. The event is listed for Sunday, May 31, 2026, with doors at 4:30 PM and showtime at 5:00 PM.

events.name: Modest Mouse Early Listening Party
events.tagline: An all-ages early listening party for Modest Mouse’s new release.
events.description: An all-ages Modest Mouse listening party hosted at Record Shop in Raleigh. The listing says no ticket or RSVP is required and gives a start time of 3:00 PM on Sunday, May 31, 2026.

events.name: S.O.S. My Plant is Dying
events.tagline: A hands-on plant rescue session for struggling houseplants.
events.description: An in-person plant care class at Copperline Plant Co. in downtown Raleigh. The event is scheduled for Sunday, May 31, 2026, from 12:00 to 1:30 PM and is listed as a $30 class.

events.name: Tea on Tenth: Rooftop Afternoon Tea at 10th & Terrace
events.tagline: A Sunday rooftop tea service with city views, curated bites, and specialty teas.
events.venue: 10th & Terrace at Residence Inn Raleigh Downtown
events.description: Tea on Tenth is a recurring Sunday afternoon tea service at 10th & Terrace featuring scones, pastries, tea sandwiches, specialty teas, and optional alcoholic beverages. The experience runs from 11 AM to 2 PM and costs $40 per person, with tax included and a 20% gratuity automatically applied.

events.name: Moorefields Open House Afternoon
events.tagline: Tour the historic Moorefields house and grounds on a quiet Sunday afternoon.
events.description: A free open house at the historic 1785 Moorefields property, with guided tours of the house and grounds by a board member. The event is held on the last Sunday afternoon of the month during the spring and summer season.

events.name: Ride into Pride - Queer Ride Carrboro Bike Month Celebration
events.tagline: A community bike ride celebrating Pride and Bike Month in Carrboro.
events.description: The 4th annual Ride into Pride is a Queer Ride Carrboro event held at Carrboro Town Commons as part of Bike Month. It is scheduled for Sunday evening and invites riders to celebrate Pride and cycling in Carrboro.

events.name: Stomp into Summer Reading!
events.tagline: Kick off summer reading with a free afternoon of library fun in Carrboro.
events.description: A free summer reading event at Drakeford Library Complex in Carrboro. Visit Chapel Hill lists it as running from 12:00 PM to 6:00 PM.

events.name: DéFi Wines Release Party & Onigiri Pairing
events.tagline: Celebrate the newest DéFi wine releases with onigiri pairings at Botanist and Barrel.
events.description: An afternoon event at Botanist and Barrel in Cedar Grove featuring pours of the newest DéFi vintages. Guests can sample the wines alongside onigiri pairings.

events.name: Carolina Hurricanes vs. Montreal Canadiens — Eastern Conference Final, Game 5
events.tagline: Canes lead the series 3-1 and can clinch their first Stanley Cup Final berth in 20 years tonight.
events.scheduleNote: Fri 8:00 PM ET (TNT / truTV / HBO Max / 99.9 The Fan)
events.description: The top-seeded Carolina Hurricanes host the Montreal Canadiens in Game 5 of the Eastern Conference Final. Carolina leads the best-of-seven series 3-1 after back-to-back overtime wins and a 4-0 Game 4 shutout, and can punch their ticket to the Stanley Cup Final — their first since 2006 — with a win tonight at Lenovo Center.
